name: data.gov.au CKAN
notes: CKAN catalog source for Australian public datasets. Resource URLs still require direct/download eligibility review.

name: Government of Canada Open Data CKAN
notes: CKAN catalog source. Resources can be files, APIs, or landing pages; use adapter review before download.

name: Chicago Data Portal Socrata Catalog
notes: Socrata catalog metadata for the Chicago Data Portal. Candidate datasets should flow through adapter review and bounded SODA sample generation.

name: Data.gov CKAN Catalog
notes: Metadata catalog powered by CKAN. Resource URLs require review before download because they may be files, APIs, landing pages, or third-party systems.

name: DataCite REST API
notes: Public DataCite DOI metadata API. Use it as a catalog-first discovery source; DOI landing pages and files still need review before download.

name: Element 84 Earth Search STAC
notes: Public STAC catalog. Treat collections as metadata until a bounded item search and asset selector are implemented.

name: ECMWF Open Data
owner: European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts

name: EMODnet ERDDAP
owner: European Marine Observation and Data Network
notes: European marine data portal with ERDDAP-style catalog access. Good test case for source-driven crawler expansion beyond NOAA.

name: FRED API
owner: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis

name: GADM Administrative Boundaries
notes: Administrative boundary dataset. Use country-scoped downloads where possible; license is not fully open for redistribution/commercial use.

name: GBIF API
notes: Public metadata and registry search are open; bulk occurrence downloads require account/citation-aware workflow.

name: GEBCO
owner: General Bathymetric Chart of the Oceans
notes: Catalog only; do not bulk download grids unless storage is planned.

name: Google Earth Engine Data Catalog
notes: Cloud geospatial analysis platform and public Earth science data catalog. Treat as a platform connector; future adapter needs Google OAuth, project registration, quota handling, and export-to-file workflow.

name: Harvard Dataverse
notes: Research repository catalog. Treat records as metadata first; file downloads need license, size, and citation review.

name: Humanitarian Data Exchange CKAN
notes: Humanitarian CKAN catalog. License, sensitivity, and update cadence must be reviewed before installation.

name: HYG Database
notes: Star catalog used by taichi_global_bathymetry.py as a renderer bridge source.

name: U.S. IOOS ERDDAP
notes: Generic ERDDAP source for coastal and ocean observations.

name: Marine Regions Maritime Boundaries
notes: Concept seed for territorial sea / EEZ / high-seas boundary layers. This is GIS vector data, not a simple lat/lon stamp.

name: Microsoft Planetary Computer STAC API
notes: STAC catalog for cloud-hosted geospatial datasets. Item/asset download should be bounded by bbox, time, asset role, and license.

name: NASA Open APIs
notes: Includes DEMO_KEY examples, but production use should use a user-owned key.

name: NOAA CoastWatch ERDDAP
owner: NOAA CoastWatch / NOAA NMFS SWFSC Environmental Research Division
notes: Official ERDDAP endpoint; adapter should generate bounded griddap/tabledap requests instead of bulk satellite-grid downloads.

name: NOAA CO-OPS Tides and Currents
owner: NOAA / Center for Operational Oceanographic Products and Services

name: NOAA GOES-R Series on AWS
notes: Representative rendering challenge source for satellite cloud imagery. Treat as object-storage catalog data; future adapter should select satellite/product/time/band before download.

name: NOAA MarineCadastre AIS Vessel Traffic
owner: BOEM / NOAA Office for Coastal Management / U.S. Coast Guard
notes: Representative group dataset for AIS vessel movement. Raw daily CSV.ZST shards are large and should be treated as spatiotemporal trajectory data, not ordinary small SQLite tables.

name: NOAA NCEI Access Data Service
owner: NOAA / National Centers for Environmental Information
notes: REST metadata/subset access. Use cautiously; this script only catalogs endpoints.

name: NOAA NCEI Climate Data Online
owner: NOAA / National Centers for Environmental Information
notes: NOAA was written as NAOO in the request; this entry targets NOAA/NCEI CDO.

name: NOAA NOMADS Model Data
notes: NOMADS grib_filter can generate bounded GRIB2 subset URLs. Future adapter should enforce model/run/variable/level/bbox and polite delay.

name: NOAA PMEL ERDDAP
notes: NOAA PMEL ERDDAP publishes many ocean-observation datasets through a machine-readable allDatasets table.

name: NYC Open Data Socrata Catalog
notes: Socrata catalog metadata for NYC Open Data. Dataset rows should be discovered through the Socrata catalog crawler and resolved to bounded SODA samples before download.

name: OpenAlex Works API
notes: OpenAlex Works metadata source filtered to type:dataset. Use it to discover research dataset candidates, then review DOI/landing-page resources before download.

name: OpenStreetMap Overpass API
notes: Read-only query API for selected OSM features. Future adapter must require bounded bbox/timeouts and respect public endpoint limits.

name: DataSF Socrata Catalog
owner: City and County of San Francisco / Socrata
notes: Socrata catalog metadata for DataSF. Use bounded SODA samples for MVP import tests; do not treat full resources as small direct JSON files.

name: UK data.gov.uk CKAN
owner: Government Digital Service / UK public sector
notes: CKAN catalog source. Use configured crawler queries before adding provider-specific adapters.

name: U.S. Census TIGERweb GeoServices
notes: Census geography service for boundaries and FIPS-based lookups. Pair with Census Data API when joining attributes to shapes.

name: Zenodo Records API
notes: General research repository. Some records contain very large archives; crawler candidates must remain metadata/review until bounded download policy exists.
